label: Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention

node.label: Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention
node.definition: Approximations or structured sparsity reduce the memory and compute cost of all-pairs attention.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention is to connect Self-attention, Algorithms & data structures to downstream capabilities including xLSTM & linear-recurrent hybrids, Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory, Paged attention & KV-memory management.
examples: substrate for Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory
substrate for Paged attention & KV-memory management
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Self-attention, Algorithms & data structures.

dependencies.rationale: Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Self-attention.
Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention uses Algorithms & data structures as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention uses Complexity & computability as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Approximations or structured sparsity reduce the memory and compute cost of all-pairs attention.
